items.title: S01E01 - Brother Benny
items.summary: Life would be rosy for Wally and Lil Briggs if it wasn't for Wally's brother, Benny, who prefers to spend Wally's wages rather than earn any of his own. He doesn't think twice before breaking into their home with a bird!

infolabels.title: Brother Benny
infolabels.plot: Life would be rosy for Wally and Lil Briggs if it wasn't for Wally's brother, Benny, who prefers to spend Wally's wages rather than earn any of his own. He doesn't think twice before breaking into their home with a bird!

items.title: S01E02 - Three's Company
items.summary: Benny's plan to move in with his brother is given the cold shoulder by Lil who is not keen on having a non-paying guest in the house.

infolabels.title: Three's Company
infolabels.plot: Benny's plan to move in with his brother is given the cold shoulder by Lil who is not keen on having a non-paying guest in the house.

items.title: S01E03 - The Set Up
items.summary: Benny causes an accident after borrowing Lil's TV set and leaving the wires trailing across the living room floor. Lil is confined to bed after tripping over the wires and Benny's penance is to do the housework for her until she recovers. But Benny is suspicious as to the extent of her injuries so, after several days of drudgery, he decides to test her out...

infolabels.title: The Set Up
infolabels.plot: Benny causes an accident after borrowing Lil's TV set and leaving the wires trailing across the living room floor. Lil is confined to bed after tripping over the wires and Benny's penance is to do the housework for her until she recovers. But Benny is suspicious as to the extent of her injuries so, after several days of drudgery, he decides to test her out...

items.title: S01E04 - Be My Guest
items.summary: Benny decides to make an honest woman of Molly and invites Wally and Lil to a posh restaurant to celebrate. As usual, Wally ends up paying the bill!

infolabels.title: Be My Guest
infolabels.plot: Benny decides to make an honest woman of Molly and invites Wally and Lil to a posh restaurant to celebrate. As usual, Wally ends up paying the bill!

items.title: S01E05 - The New Look
items.summary: Lil is anxious to have her bedroom redecorated and Benny offers to do the job for half-price. When she sees how little he has done on the first day she fires him - a decision she lives to regret.

infolabels.title: The New Look
infolabels.plot: Lil is anxious to have her bedroom redecorated and Benny offers to do the job for half-price. When she sees how little he has done on the first day she fires him - a decision she lives to regret.

items.title: S01E06 - Foggy Night
items.summary: When Benny and Molly are stranded in the fog, they turn up at the Briggs' house asking to stay the night. A reluctant Lil has to let them stay but is determined to get her own back on Wally's sponging brother.

infolabels.title: Foggy Night
infolabels.plot: When Benny and Molly are stranded in the fog, they turn up at the Briggs' house asking to stay the night. A reluctant Lil has to let them stay but is determined to get her own back on Wally's sponging brother.

items.title: S02E01 - Gambling Fever
items.summary: Wally misses his gambling, when Lil decides to intercept his pay packet. Benny comes up with a scheme to get Wally back into the bookies

infolabels.title: Gambling Fever
infolabels.plot: Wally misses his gambling, when Lil decides to intercept his pay packet. Benny comes up with a scheme to get Wally back into the bookies

items.title: S02E02 - The Kid
items.summary: Lil's nephew, Jimmy, has come to stay and has brought with him a variety of small pets. Wally and Benny can't resist playing a few schoolboy pranks on Lil ...

infolabels.title: The Kid
infolabels.plot: Lil's nephew, Jimmy, has come to stay and has brought with him a variety of small pets. Wally and Benny can't resist playing a few schoolboy pranks on Lil ...

items.title: S02E03 - The Homework
items.summary: Jimmy is still with the Briggs and his attempt at doing his homework is not helped when Benny and Wally get involved!

infolabels.title: The Homework
infolabels.plot: Jimmy is still with the Briggs and his attempt at doing his homework is not helped when Benny and Wally get involved!

items.title: S02E04 - Change Partners
items.summary: Wally is not normally the jealous type but when Lil announces she has taken up old-time dancing and is going away with her handsome dance partner, his suspicions are aroused.

infolabels.title: Change Partners
infolabels.plot: Wally is not normally the jealous type but when Lil announces she has taken up old-time dancing and is going away with her handsome dance partner, his suspicions are aroused.

items.title: S02E05 - Blackjack
items.summary: Wally and Benny are frittering away money at the greyhound track but, after finally getting a big win on a dog called 'Blackjack', Wally is offered a chance to buy the dog ... an offer he seems unable to refuse!

infolabels.title: Blackjack
infolabels.plot: Wally and Benny are frittering away money at the greyhound track but, after finally getting a big win on a dog called 'Blackjack', Wally is offered a chance to buy the dog ... an offer he seems unable to refuse!

items.title: S02E06 - The New Bed
items.summary: Lil is unhappy with their uncomfortable bed and wants a new one but Wally is perfectly happy with it. Benny, ever the opportunist, takes them to his friends furniture warehouse in order to see the beds on show ...

infolabels.title: The New Bed
infolabels.plot: Lil is unhappy with their uncomfortable bed and wants a new one but Wally is perfectly happy with it. Benny, ever the opportunist, takes them to his friends furniture warehouse in order to see the beds on show ...

items.title: S02E07 - The Handyman
items.summary: Phyllis, a glamorous friend of Molly's wants Wally to do some odd jobs around her flat. Benny suggests that she invite Wally to her flat, without mentioning the work. Wally is delighted at the invitation, blissfully unaware at what lies ahead.

infolabels.title: The Handyman
infolabels.plot: Phyllis, a glamorous friend of Molly's wants Wally to do some odd jobs around her flat. Benny suggests that she invite Wally to her flat, without mentioning the work. Wally is delighted at the invitation, blissfully unaware at what lies ahead.

items.title: S02E08 - Woman Trouble
items.summary: Lil is fed up with Benny living with them so when she hears that Carole, one of his ex-girlfriends, has divorced, she encourages him to take up with her again. After all Carole is wealthy and she can afford him more than they can!

infolabels.title: Woman Trouble
infolabels.plot: Lil is fed up with Benny living with them so when she hears that Carole, one of his ex-girlfriends, has divorced, she encourages him to take up with her again. After all Carole is wealthy and she can afford him more than they can!

items.title: S02E09 - The Job
items.summary: Lil is fed up with Benny living with them so when she hears that Carole, one of his ex-girlfriends, has divorced, she encourages him to take up with her again. After all Carole is wealthy and she can afford him more than they can!

infolabels.title: The Job
infolabels.plot: Lil is fed up with Benny living with them so when she hears that Carole, one of his ex-girlfriends, has divorced, she encourages him to take up with her again. After all Carole is wealthy and she can afford him more than they can!

items.title: S02E10 - The Bargain
items.summary: Benny is on commission from a friend to sell some big freezers. He persuades Lil to buy one but it soon goes wrong and he gets more than the cold shoulder from his irate sister-in-law ...

infolabels.title: The Bargain
infolabels.plot: Benny is on commission from a friend to sell some big freezers. He persuades Lil to buy one but it soon goes wrong and he gets more than the cold shoulder from his irate sister-in-law ...

items.title: S02E11 - The Policy
items.summary: Lil wants to take out a life insurance policy on Wally but he's having nothing to do with it - so Lil decides to take out the policy in secret. Naturally, Benny knows a friend who can do it while earning himself some commission at the same time.

infolabels.title: The Policy
infolabels.plot: Lil wants to take out a life insurance policy on Wally but he's having nothing to do with it - so Lil decides to take out the policy in secret. Naturally, Benny knows a friend who can do it while earning himself some commission at the same time.

items.title: S02E12 - The Repair
items.summary: When Lil's nephew Jimmy arrives on a stop over before his fishing trip, Wally accidentally creates chaos ...

infolabels.title: The Repair
infolabels.plot: When Lil's nephew Jimmy arrives on a stop over before his fishing trip, Wally accidentally creates chaos ...

items.title: S02E13 - The Holiday
items.summary: As if they hadn't had enough of his company, Benny persuades Wally and Lil to go on a package holiday to Spain!

infolabels.title: The Holiday
infolabels.plot: As if they hadn't had enough of his company, Benny persuades Wally and Lil to go on a package holiday to Spain!
